title: Fungi
description: A mod that adds some fungus related features.
body:
Fungi adds some fungus related features. There are versions of this mod for both [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.19.4.html) and [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/), the Fabric version requires the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

Current Features

Mycelium Roots

  • Spreads over the surfaces of blocks.
  • 2 game rules regulate the speed of growth for lag reasons.

Spore Launcher

  • Launches Fungal Spores every few seconds.
  • Grows from Mycelium Roots

Spore Cluster

  • Explodes with spores when attempted to be mined.
  • Grows from Mycelium Roots

Fungal Spore

  • A small spore that grows into a Mycelium Roots block after a while.
